item.title: TheSundayGame: The Sunday Game @TheSundayGame · 2min Patrick Horgan felt Cork 'were on it today' against Tipperary and Anthony Daly on
item.description: The Sunday Game @TheSundayGame · 2min Patrick Horgan felt Cork 'were on it today' against Tipperary and Anthony Daly on an overall view that the 'better team' won in the Munster SHC round 1 game #rtegaa #sundaygame 1:01 2 190

item.title: thomasniblock: Thomas Niblock @thomasniblock · 3min Westmeath stun Meath. Wicklow almost cause the king of upsets against Dublin. Louth
item.description:
Thomas Niblock @thomasniblock · 3min Westmeath stun Meath. Wicklow almost cause the king of upsets against Dublin. Louth, Derry & Kildare win big. Monaghan beat Cavan, Philly McMahon knows more about farming than you’d think.
Listen here: https:// bit.ly/4vE4109 Watch here: https:// bit.ly/41L6ND7 BBC SPORT NI y 6 más 1 2 82

item.title: RTEgaa: RTÉ GAA @RTEgaa · 3min Patrick Horgan felt Cork 'were on it today' against Tipperary and Anthony Daly on an overall view
item.description: RTÉ GAA @RTEgaa · 3min Patrick Horgan felt Cork 'were on it today' against Tipperary and Anthony Daly on an overall view that the 'better team' won in the Munster SHC round 1 game #rtegaa #sundaygame 1 162

item.title: RTEgaa: RTÉ GAA @RTEgaa · 19min 'We firmly believed coming into here today that we could put on a performance, that we could tro
item.description: RTÉ GAA @RTEgaa · 19min 'We firmly believed coming into here today that we could put on a performance, that we could trouble them,' said the @westmeath_gaa boss #rtegaa #sundaygame De rte.ie 1 970
